title: Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON COUNCIL ON DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on disability-related resources and groups. Resources include opportunities for trainings, consultations, and advocacy/self-advocacy, financial support for disability-related trainings and conferences, and advocacy for public policy affecting people with disabilities. Programs are for families and individuals affected by disability, direct care providers, case workers, and others. 2475 SE Ladd Avenue Suite 231 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 204-8824 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON COUNCIL ON DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE
